message:
Perf: batch commit reads in log(), fileLog(), isAncestor, findMergeBase

- log(): batch-read entire BFS frontier per level instead of one commit
  at a time; sort by timestamp for correct chronological order
- fileLog(): batch-read commits + parent commits per level, reducing
  N+1 readObject calls to 2 readObjects calls per BFS level
- isAncestor/findMergeBase: already committed in previous patch
